originalTitle: Spurs-Thunder Game 1 peaked at 12M viewers
originalDescription: San Antonio's 122-115 double-overtime victory over Oklahoma City on Monday night was the most-watched Western Conference Game 1 final in league history, averaging 9.2 million viewers on NBC and Peacock, according to Nielsen and Adobe Analytics.
